input.title: Agentic RAG Upgrade Decision
input.problem_summary: A team wants to add agentic RAG because answer quality is uneven.
assumptions: No fixed hard-case evaluation exists yet
risks: Agentic orchestration can increase latency and failure surface

rationale: 缺少评测和 trace 时，应延后 agentic 升级，先补 baseline 证据。
